title: Coinwaft: Iran warns next phase of attacks will be MORE FORCEFUL even as ceasefire negotiations ongoing

title: MyNews366: US, Iran in talks for a 45-day ceasefire to pave way for lasting peace
snippet: Two-phase framework aims to de-escalate tensions, reopen Strait of Hormuz, and progress on Iran's uranium program within a broader deal.

title: Bulldoghill (Linda Hill): Trump Fox News - deal to end Iran conflict possible by Monday. Iran rejected 48-hour ceasefire proposal
snippet: In phone interview with Fox, Trump said deal could be reached by Monday. Iran rejected US proposal for 48-hour ceasefire sent through intermediaries.
